title: Inherits
text: Inherits This property indicates whether the current object inherits from a modeled object. Boolean read-only. Description If True , the current object is a derived object and iIts Inherits From property specifies the modeled object from which this object is derived. Applies To Component Component Entity Component Field Label Subtype Entity Subtype Field Related Links Inherits From This property specifies the name of the development object from which the current object inherits. Depending on the context, it may be read-only or editable. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
